message:
fix(airtable,figma): add C3.4 constraints_cbor to unit test token generation

Both connectors' generate_valid_token() helpers were missing CBOR-serialized
CapabilityConstraints, causing test_invoke_without_config and
test_invoke_missing_field to fail with CapabilityDenied instead of reaching
connector validation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
